      Design Feature

      Due date
      Description
      Redesign the hero section of the homepage for Acme Corporation's website redesign project. Update heading hierarchy, color scheme, and call-to-action buttons to match new branding guidelines. Coordinate with the design team on motion choices and confirm with the client before merging.
      Checklist2 of 5 · 40%
      Research competitor hero sections NT
      Create initial sketches SC
      Finalize color palette JC
      Update CSS and animations SC
      Get client feedback
      Created Mar 1, 2026 · Updated 2 days ago
      JC
      Joshua Castilla
      I think we should use a more prominent gradient. The current design feels flat.
      Mar 4, 2:15 PM 👍 2
      SC
      Sarah Chen You
      @Joshua Thanks for the feedback! I'll explore gradient options today.
      Mar 4, 3:30 PM 👍 1
      JC
      Joshua Castilla
      @Sarah Perfect — aim for something that feels warm but still brand-compliant.
      Mar 4, 4:02 PM

      @Joshua Agreed. Let's also warm up the CTA color while we're at it.

      General

      Danger zone

      Archive this board

      The board is hidden from the active list. You can restore it from the Archive tab at any time.

      Reset board

      Clear all cards and restore the default columns. This action can't be undone.

      Lists

      Reorder, rename, recolor, or set a WIP limit on each column. Drag the handle to reorder.

      Labels

      Organize cards with color-coded tags. Click a swatch to change its color.

      Log a touchpoint
      Capture what just happened with the client — calls, quick emails, in-person visits, or meetings outside Fellow. Limited to the last 14 days so the papertrail stays honest.

      Opens a pre-filled event in Google Calendar — attendees get the invite once you hit Save there. The upcoming meeting also appears in this Touchpoints list.
